Papi_poker99: raises 480 to 680 and is all-in
avonni d3: folds 
Frenhane82: calls 480
*** FLOP *** [Ts 4s 7s]
*** TURN *** [Ts 4s 7s] [6d]
*** RIVER *** [Ts 4s 7s 6d] [4h]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Frenhane82: shows [Kc Ad] (a pair of Fours)
Papi_poker99: shows [5h Ah] (a pair of Fours - lower kicker)
Frenhane82 collected 1585 from pot
Papi_poker99 finished the tournament in 5th place
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 1585 | Rake 0 
Board [Ts 4s 7s 6d 4h]
Seat 2: Frenhane82 (big blind) showed [Kc Ad] and won (1585) with a pair of Fours
